description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with the variable AWS_DEFAULT_REGION set to us-east-2 and two stages named staging and deployment. In the staging stage add a job called staging that uses the python:3.6 image, runs only on the deployment branch and must be triggered manually; its before_script runs cd backend/, make install, cd .., creates an SSH key by writing $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY to ~/.ssh/id_rsa, sets chmod 600, and disables strict host checking, its script executes pwd, ls -al, apt-get update, apt-get install -y rsync, and bash .gitlab-stage.sh, and its after_script runs pwd, cd backend, pip install -r requirements.txt, chmod 774 datasets/python_utils/*, make test, and echoes "***ALL BACKEND TESTS PASSING***". In the deployment stage add a job called deploy that uses the ubuntu:18.04 image and runs only on the deployment branch; its before_script creates the same SSH key setup, its script runs pwd, ls -al, apt-get update, apt-get install -y rsync openssh-client, and bash .gitlab-deploy.sh, and its after_script runs pwd, apt-get update, apt-get install -y nodejs npm mocha, cd frontend/react-app/, npm install --save-dev babel-loader babel-core babel-preset-env babel-preset-es2015 babel-preset-stage-2 babel-cli webpack, mocha --compilers js:babel-core/register tests.js, and echoes "***ALL FRONTEND TESTS PASSING***".
